name: Mocha-Raspberry Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cake into 10-12 slices.
2. Place half the slices in the trifle bowl.
3. Sprinkle evenly with half of the Kahlua.
4. Top with half of the raspberries.
5. Sprinkle with one-third of the chocolate.
6. Spread with half of the custard.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Decorate with whipped cream, remaining dark chocolate, and extra raspberries.
9. To make Coffee Custard:
a. Whisk egg yolks, cornstarch, and sugar together in a pan until smooth.
b. Heat milk in a separate pan.
c. Gradually stir the hot milk into the egg yolk mixture.
d. Cook, stirring constantly until the mixture boils and thickens.
e. Add the combined coffee, water, and vanilla; cover with plastic wrap to prevent skin from forming.
f. Cool to room temperature.
g. Beat whipping cream until soft peaks form and fold into custard.
